messages.content: do you know anything that is from internet?

can you go to internet?

what happend yesterday?

I apologize, but as an AI language model, I don't have access to real-time information, including events that happened yesterday. My responses are based on a snapshot of the internet's information up until September 2021. If you have any specific questions or need assistance with a particular topic, feel free to ask!
what year does gpt 2 have of internet?

The training data includes web pages, articles, books, and various publicly available text sources. It's important to note that while GPT-2 has a broad understanding of many topics, the specific information it provides may not be up to date or reflect current events beyond that timeframe.
